codeReview.summary: The feature implementation matches the specified Docker requirements: it adds a two-stage Python 3.12-slim build with uv, includes both root and server Dockerfiles, sets uvicorn on port 8000, and adds a .dockerignore excluding required paths. Commit evidence and worker verification logs show successful docker build/run, /health success within 30 seconds, image size under 500MB, and clean container shutdown.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The server-worker skill lacks explicit guidance on handling openenv-core transitive dependency bloat for the <500MB Docker target, which led to multiple trial-and-error image-trimming iterations.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: handoff.handoff.skillFeedback.suggestedChanges requests adding this guidance; transcript skeleton shows repeated Docker rebuild/debug cycles after over-aggressive trimming before arriving at a stable 480MB image.

summary: Review passed. No blocking or non-blocking code defects were found in commit fa814ac for the dockerfile feature. One shared-state skill-gap observation was recorded regarding Docker image-size optimization guidance.
